{{Quote|It is my unfortunate duty to translate the disgusting grunts of Gartogg, a Gamorrean of exceptionally low intelligence.|K8-LR|<ref name="Star Wars SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Smash Little Creatures!}}</ref>}}
'''K-8LR''' was a polished, silver [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] that once belonged to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] and [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

Programmed to communicate with the Palace's [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards, K-8LR once translated a message from [[Gartogg/Legends|Gartogg]], calling upon hunters to eliminate wild animals that ran amok at the Palace's garbage pits.

K-8LR was assigned to Jabba's [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] townhouse. It helped [[Muftak/Legends|Muftak]] and [[Kabe/Legends|Kabe]] rob the place and escaped when they took off its [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]].

The droid, however, did not escape. For the resulting burning of the [[Desilijic Complex/Legends|town house]], K-8LR was severely punished and replaced.

{{Droid-stub}}
